meaning: n.衣袋,口袋,钱,财vt.装...在口袋里,隐藏(感情),据为己有,击...入袋adj.袖珍的,小型的
examples: I slid the wallet into his pocket.
He stuck his gloves in his pocket.
He had a few pennies in his pocket.
For its reward Symyx stands to pocket up to 5% of sales of malleable polypro.
An even older chip finds a happy home in the popular Blackberry pocket e-mailer.
